response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Mismatch & Discard: The reference JSON was highly inaccurate. It provided the Japanese lyrics for 'GETCHA!' while Hololive English -Justice- performed the English version. Furthermore, it completely misidentified Mori Calliope's performance as 'Scuffed Up Age' instead of 'Wanted, Wasted', and did not contain the lyrics for Hakos Baelz's performance of 'Snake'. 2. Manual Transcription Mandate: Performed 100% manual transcription and translation for all three songs, matching phonetic audio events. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each block exactly to the vocal onset and offset, applying aggressive truncation to prevent cascading delays during rapid sections. Added ellipses during partial words/transitions.
